creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 175808
Patch for prometheus 1.2.0 port

@Thomas, please review this attachment 175808 and set maintainer-approval to + if you are happy for it to be the version that is used for commit. 

Alternatively, set maintainer-approval on the attachment to '-' to specify that it shouldn't be used, with comment if necessary.
